ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Continued To Mar-24-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel, Harlan M. Reese, Esq. is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Mar-24-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court orders notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Appearances: Jennifer Myers of the Reese Law Group (760.842.5850) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party. No other appearances.

Discussed. The Court states it has received a proof of service indicating the moving papers were served on defendant. The Court modified its tentative ruling on Friday, July 26, 2019 and notified all parties by email. The Court adopts its modified tentative ruling as follows: Granted as unopposed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com (302/EPS)
